# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

Resources:
  FileStorageBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: my-file-storage-bucket
      AccessControl: Private
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Suspended
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: "arn:aws:iam::<account-id>:role/application-role"
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
            Resource: 
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::my-file-storage-bucket/*"
